languages.text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: "Aber was ist mit..." {n}Der junge Mann wendet sich an An-Vido und wirft verzweifelt die Hände hoch.{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: "Mais qu'en est-il..." {n}Le jeune homme se tourne vers An-Vido et lève les mains en signe de désespoir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: "但是......"{n}年轻人转向安-维多，绝望地举起双手。{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: "Pero qué pasa con..." {n}El joven se vuelve hacia An-Vido y levanta las manos desesperado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: 「でも...」。{n}青年はアンヴィドに向き直り、両手を上げて絶望した。{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}

languages.text: "Peki ya..." {n}Genç adam An-Vido'ya döner ve çaresizlik içinde ellerini havaya kaldırır.{/n}
languages.original_text: "But what about..." {n}The young man turns to An-Vido and throws up his hands in desperation.{/n}
